message:
add pull request target

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,8 +5,8 @@ on:
     branches: [main, develop]
   pull_request:
     types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled]
-  # pull_request_target:
-  #   types: [labeled, unlabeled]
+  pull_request:
+    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 env:
